## ⚠ No personal data

By submitting this issue you confirm: no real CPAP recordings, no EDF files, no personal identifying info, no secrets. Mask anything specific to your therapy or person — values like AHI numbers, dates, mask types are fine; medication names, provider names, ICD codes are not.
